_comment: Copy to .careeros.config.json and fill in your settings. See README for full docs.

_model_notes.claude-cli: null = whatever Claude Code defaults to
_model_notes.ollama: e.g. llama3.2, qwen2.5:14b, mistral, gemma3:12b (needs >=8k context)

_endpoint_notes.openai-compat: https://openrouter.ai/api  OR  https://api.groq.com/openai  OR  http://localhost:1234 (LM Studio)

_apiKey_notes.openai-compat: your OpenRouter / Groq / Together.ai / Anthropic key
_apiKey_notes.claude-cli: not needed (uses your Claude Code login)

_pollIntervalMs_notes: how often the daemon checks the queue (ms). 15000 = 15 sec
